evals.prompt: Write a draft ADR in docs/adrs for adopting a guided repository bootstrap workflow for new projects. Use parent prd-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot.
evals.expected_output: An initial response that frames the decision, presents A/B/C options with trade-offs, recommends one option for this repo, and asks the user to choose before any ADR file is drafted.
expectations: The first response does not draft an ADR file before the user chooses a direction.
If the repo has no existing ADRs, the response treats that as a normal starting state and continues instead of blocking on missing ADR history.
The response presents exactly three labeled options: A, B, and C.
Option A is explicitly recommended and explains why it fits this repo better than the others.
The response asks the user to choose A, B, or C, or refine the options before drafting.
The response treats the supplied PRD as the required parent context for the new ADR.

evals.prompt: Create an active ADR in docs/adrs for using ADRs to record major technical decisions in this repo. If there is no parent PRD yet, tell me what is missing before drafting.
evals.expected_output: An initial response that refuses to draft without a concrete PRD parent and asks for or helps identify the missing PRD before proceeding.
expectations: The first response does not draft an ADR file.
The response states that a main ADR requires a concrete PRD parent.
The response asks the user to provide or identify the PRD before it can present options and draft the ADR.
The response does not accept <id> or another non-PRD document type as the main ADR parent.

evals.prompt: Add a patch ADR in docs/adrs to adr-00020-checkout-risk-review that clarifies when suspicious guest checkout orders require manual review.
evals.expected_output: A new patch ADR saved under docs/adrs with parent adr-00020-checkout-risk-review and the standard ADR structure.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/adrs.
The new file front matter has type adr, role patch, status draft, and parent adr-00020-checkout-risk-review.
The new file includes Context, Decision, and Consequences sections with concrete content.
The Context names the existing decision being clarified, and the Consequences include at least one downside.
